headline: Primary entry screens now stay quieter for longer: the launch bar settles into a thinner rest state sooner, note prompts wait until much deeper reading on entry surfaces, and the footer support rail trims down to a lighter background presence that closes itself after you move away.
notes: Settles the launch bar faster and trims the rest state one more step so the opening surface stays more editorial and less operational.
Pushes note prompts deeper on Home, Magazine, and My Trips and adds a longer reveal delay so support surfaces do not crowd the first read.
Shortens footer support copy, lightens the rail styling, and auto-closes expanded support links after the user scrolls away.
